verificationNotes: REPAIR new source. Verified via OpenCLI browser extract: 12304 chars. Contains 4 detailed guidelines: (1) Protection of University Data — confidential data prohibited with public AI tools without review, (2) Responsibility for Content Accuracy and Ownership, (3) Academic Integrity — contact Chicago Center for Teaching and Learning, (4) Procuring and Acquiring Generative AI Tools — security review required. Plus comprehensive FAQ on tool review process, IRB requirements, review criteria, paid vs enterprise tools. Contact: Kevin Boyd (CIO), Matt Morton (CISO).
